texto: See, the thing that bothers me with young actors, young actors of color specifically, is that they see movies and television, and they figure that's all it is to it. They have no respect for the craft. They want to be, you know, movie stars or whatever. And I worry that we're losing a certain quality, you know?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de James Avery que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “See, the thing that bothers me with young actors, young actors of color specifically, is that the…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, stars, quality, com foco em quality e color.
